basic_details.job_title: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Public Service Commission (OPSC) Language Officer (Group-B) Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. 03 of 2026-27 on the official website of OPSC. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: Rs. 700/- for candidates other than SC, ST and PwD. Nil for SC, ST and PwD candidates. Fee is refundable to candidates who appear in both papers of the Written Examination.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation: 5 years for ST/Women/Ex-Servicemen, 10 years for PwD, cumulative for ST + PwD.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with Odia/English Honours and Law Graduation
qualification.details: Qualification: Graduation with Odia as Honours subject or Graduation with English as Honours subject and Odia as Pass/Compulsory subject or Post-Graduation in Odia + Graduation in Law from a recognized University. Experience (for Age Relaxation): Minimum 7 years of service (or 3 years with at least 1 year translation work) in relevant Group B/C government posts.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Rs. 35,400/- (Level-9 of Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules 2017) Plus usual Dearness Allowance and other allowances sanctioned by Government of Odisha.

selection_process: Written Examination (Subjective Type) - 300 marks (Paper-I & Paper-II) Viva-Voce Test - 40 marks
how_to_apply: Apply online only through the official website https://opsc.gov.in
Upload scanned photograph, signature, Left Thumb Impression and all required documents.
Submit the application before 03 August 2026 (5:00 PM).
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.
important_instructions: Candidates must be Indian citizens of good character and sound health. Government servants must submit No Objection Certificate. Only Odisha ST certificates by birth are valid. Mere selection does not guarantee appointment.

rows.details: Graduation with Odia/English Honours and Law Graduation

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification: Graduation with Odia as Honours subject or Graduation with English as Honours subject and Odia as Pass/Compulsory subject or Post-Graduation in Odia + Graduation in Law from a recognized University. Experience (for Age Relaxation): Minimum 7 years of service (or 3 years with at least 1 year translation work) in relevant Group B/C government posts.

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Pay Scale: Rs. 35,400/- (Level-9 of Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules 2017) Plus usual Dearness Allowance and other allowances sanctioned by Government of Odisha.

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit (as on 01 January 2026)
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation: 5 years for ST/Women/Ex-Servicemen, 10 years for PwD, cumulative for ST + PwD.

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Rs. 700/- for candidates other than SC, ST and PwD. Nil for SC, ST and PwD candidates. Fee is refundable to candidates who appear in both papers of the Written Examination.

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Examination (Subjective Type) - 300 marks (Paper-I & Paper-II) Viva-Voce Test - 40 marks

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - General Information / Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates must be Indian citizens of good character and sound health. Government servants must submit No Objection Certificate. Only Odisha ST certificates by birth are valid. Mere selection does not guarantee appointment.

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Apply online only through the official website https://opsc.gov.in Upload scanned photograph, signature, Left Thumb Impression and all required documents. Submit the application before 03 August 2026 (5:00 PM). Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click Here Official Website: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for OPSC Language Officer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 03 August 2026 till 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in OPSC Language Officer Recruitment?
faq.answer: Total 03 vacancies (01 reserved for Women) under Advertisement No. 03 of 2026-27.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for OPSC Language Officer post?
faq.answer: Rs. 35,400/- in Level-9 of Pay Matrix plus usual allowances.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Graduation with Odia Honours or English Honours with Odia + Graduation in Law from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: 21 to 42 years as on 01 January 2026 with applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Written Examination (300 marks) followed by Viva-Voce Test (40 marks).
